title: Add optional Logfire observability
description: Add opt-in Pydantic Logfire instrumentation for the Pydantic AI translation workflow so LLM agent runs can be observed end-to-end.
close_reason: Added opt-in Logfire instrumentation for Pydantic AI agent/model runs with CLI flags and tests.

title: Diagnose XLIFF over-selection of translated units
description: Investigate why strings_zh-CN.xliff selects 56 units for translation when only 11 should need translation, then fix XLIFF filtering and add regression coverage.
close_reason: Fixed XLIFF filtering to skip done states even when target equals source; strings_zh-CN.xliff now selects 11 units.

title: Add review file write logic for PO/XLIFF
description:
## Why
Review results need to be written back to files. PO and XLIFF have different review marking mechanisms.

## What
Add review-specific apply logic to PoTranslator and XliffTranslator:
- Non-auto-fix: set fuzzy + note on revise/reject entries
- Auto-fix: write corrected target, clear fuzzy, mark translated
- Pass entries: no change

PO behavior:
- revise/reject: set #, fuzzy, add # review: comment
- auto-fix: write msgstr, clear fuzzy, remove review comment

XLIFF behavior:
- revise/reject: markreviewneeded(), add <note>
- auto-fix: settarget() + marktranslated()

## Acceptance
- PO: review marks correct entries as fuzzy with notes
- PO: auto-fix writes corrections and clears markers
- XLIFF: review sets needs-review state with notes
- XLIFF: auto-fix writes corrections and sets translated state
- Pass entries untouched in both formats
- Unit tests for both formats

## Dependencies
- aitran-38y (reviewer agent - needs ReviewedUnit schema)

## Design
See docs/design-review-agent.md section File Write Behavior
close_reason: Added apply_review_batch to PoTranslator and XliffTranslator. Non-auto-fix marks revise/reject as fuzzy with notes; auto-fix writes corrected target and clears fuzzy. 8 tests covering pass/revise/reject/auto-fix/mixed scenarios.

title: Add review CLI subcommand and orchestration
description:
## Why
Users need a CLI entry point to run reviews on translated files.

## What
Add `aitran review` subcommand to cli.py:
- Accepts file or directory
- Options: --model, --host, --api-key, --context-length, --strict, --auto-fix
- Orchestrates: parse file -> QA checks -> filter -> batch -> LLM review -> apply results -> print summary
- Summary report: pass/revise/reject counts

## Acceptance
- `aitran review file.po` works end-to-end
- `aitran review file.po --strict` reviews all units
- `aitran review file.po --auto-fix` writes corrections
- `aitran review dir/` processes all PO/XLIFF files in directory
- Summary printed to stdout after review
- Works with both PO and XLIFF files

## Dependencies
- aitran-2gx (module refactoring)
- aitran-8y8 (QA module)
- aitran-38y (reviewer agent)

## Design
See docs/design-review-agent.md sections CLI, Data Flow
close_reason: Added review CLI subcommand with orchestration: _build_review_input_xml, _filter_review_units, _run_review_async, review_po in translate.py; review command in cli.py with all options. All lint errors fixed, 96 tests passing.

title: Implement reviewer agent in agents/reviewer.py
description:
## Why
The review agent is the LLM component of the hybrid QA+review pipeline. It receives QA errors + source + target and produces verdicts, corrections, and notes.

## What
Create src/aitran/agents/reviewer.py:
- ReviewBatch / ReviewedUnit Pydantic models
- build_reviewer_agent() with system prompt, dynamic instructions, output_validator
- Review prompt that instructs LLM to evaluate QA findings (confirm/dismiss), assess quality, provide corrections

## Acceptance
- ReviewedUnit: index, verdict (pass/revise/reject), corrected (optional), note (optional)
- ReviewBatch: list[ReviewedUnit]
- Output validator checks index completeness (reuse from _base.py)
- Prompt includes guidelines for evaluating QA errors as context
- Prompt supports strict mode (review all) and non-strict mode (review problematic only)
- Tests with TestModel/FunctionModel similar to translator agent tests

## Design
See docs/design-review-agent.md sections Output Schema, Verdict Semantics, Review Prompt
close_reason: Implemented reviewer agent: ReviewBatch/ReviewedUnit schema, ReviewDeps, build_reviewer_agent() with prompt, dynamic instructions, output_validator (index completeness + verdict validation). 6 tests covering schema, agent run, and TestModel integration.

title: Add QA module with translate-toolkit checker integration
description:
## Why
The review agent needs rule-based QA checks as input context. translate-toolkit has StandardChecker with multiple checkers (printf, xmltags, endpunc, brackets, caps, etc.) that we need to wrap.

## What
Create src/aitran/qa/ module:
- __init__.py: QARunner that runs checkers on units, returns structured QA errors per unit
- checkers.py: checker configuration, allowlist of enabled checkers, severity levels

## Acceptance
- QARunner.check_unit(unit) returns list of QAError (checker_name, message, severity)
- Hard checkers (printf, xmltags, xmlentity) enabled by default
- Soft checkers (endpunc, brackets, caps, puncspacing) enabled by default
- Configurable checker set via allowlist
- Works with both PO and XLIFF units (via translate-toolkit common API)
- Unit tests cover each checker type

## Design
See docs/design-review-agent.md section QA Checks
close_reason: Added qa/ module: checkers.py (TeeChecker config with broad coverage), runner.py (QARunner with check_unit/check_units), structured QAError/UnitQAReport output. 9 tests covering placeholder, XML, bracket, punc, unchanged checks.

title: Refactor agent.py into agents/ module
description:
## Why
The project is growing beyond a single translator agent. We need a modular structure to support multiple agents (translator, reviewer, future agents).

## What
Split src/aitran/agent.py into src/aitran/agents/ module:
- _base.py: build_model(), shared types, common output_validator logic
- translator.py: build_translator_agent(), TranslationBatch, TranslatedUnit, TranslationDeps
- reviewer.py: placeholder for review agent (next issue)
- __init__.py: re-exports for backwards compatibility

## Acceptance
- from aitran.agent import build_model still works (re-export)
- from aitran.agents import build_translator_agent works
- All existing tests pass without changes (or with minimal import fixes)
- No functional changes — pure refactor

## Design
See docs/design-review-agent.md section Module Structure
close_reason: Refactored agent.py into agents/ module: _base.py (shared), translator.py (translator agent + prompts). Deleted prompts/ module, updated all imports. 73 tests pass.

title: Update apply_batch to handle plural targets
description: Modify PoTranslator.apply_batch to use targets list for plural units. Use sync_plural_count to align to the correct number of forms.

title: Add plural translation tests
description: Test with German (nplurals=2) and Arabic (nplurals=6) PO files. Verify correct number of plural forms are produced and applied.

title: Include plural sources in prompt XML
description: Update build_input_xml to emit source_plural and plural_forms elements for plural units. Update prompt to explain plural form semantics.

title: Add plural form support to TranslatedUnit data structure
description: Extend TranslatedUnit with a targets: list[str] field for plural translations. Keep target for singular-only backward compat. Add plural_form_count to TranslationDeps so LLM knows how many forms to produce.

title: Verify plural and XML helper edge cases
description: Add regression coverage for Chinese plural handling and translate-toolkit XML helper interaction with pydantic-ai format_as_xml/entity decoding.
close_reason: Added regression coverage for Chinese plural forms and XML/entity helper edge cases.

title: Apply translate-toolkit API backlog improvements
description: Clarify supported formats in AGENTS.md and implement gettext/XLIFF focused toolkit API improvements: official XLIFF mutation API, language labels in prompts, and misc helpers for escaping/string handling.
close_reason: Implemented gettext/XLIFF scope guidance, toolkit-backed XLIFF application, language labels, and misc helper usage.

title: Deepen translate-toolkit API inventory
description: Expand internal translate-toolkit research beyond tool modules, covering storage, formats, filters, language helpers, converters, and library-level extension points usable by aitran.
close_reason: Expanded docs/backlog-internal.md into a module-level translate-toolkit API inventory.

title: Research translate-toolkit APIs for aitran backlog
description: Investigate translate-toolkit modules and APIs that aitran can reuse, then record actionable findings in an internal backlog document.
close_reason: Recorded translate-toolkit API research in docs/backlog-internal.md
